body:
## Parent

#49

## What to build

Complete the non-waivable final acceptance audit against the same bound evidence set. Confirm that repository, module, CI, Pages, release downloads, tap, documentation, and maintainer installation all represent one coherent Packy identity, then announce availability and unfreeze ordinary automation.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The final evidence binds the pre-rename base SHA, candidate SHA, merged Packy SHA, immutable v0.1.7 tag, hosted schema bytes, release assets, formula, and workstation state.
- [ ] Every required command or probe has its timestamp, relevant tool version, exit status, and complete output or durable log link.
- [ ] Repository/module, CI/workflows, Pages schemas, release downloads, tap, and current documentation pass the issue #54 contract without waiver or stale evidence.
- [ ] The maintainer installation has fresh Packy ownership, zero active Matty product residuals, a working semantic matty pack, and preserved Engram, contributor content, recovery material, and history.
- [ ] Failed, missing, ambiguous, or invalidated evidence blocks acceptance and keeps automation frozen.
- [ ] Packy availability is announced and ordinary release/synchronization automation is unfrozen only after every gate passes.

## Blocked by

- #65
title: Complete the Packy final audit and reopen automation
